title: Severe I/O pressure on {{host.name}}
description: Linux PSI reports that ALL tasks were blocked on I/O at some point in the recent window. The disk or block layer is the bottleneck and the entire system is waiting on it.

definition.message:
I/O pressure (`full` avg60) is above 15% on {{host.name}}. EVERY task on the host has been blocked on I/O at the same time, repeatedly, over the last minute. The disk or block layer is fully saturated.

Investigate: `iostat -x 1` for high `%util` and large `await`, `iotop` for the dominant writer, `dmesg` for hardware errors. Common causes: a runaway fsync loop (database checkpoint, log flush), an underprovisioned cloud volume, or a failing disk.

Notification handles are deliberately omitted from this template - configure them at install time to match your on-call setup.
definition.name: Severe I/O pressure on {{host.name}}
